reviews.review_description: I didn’t know until now that they shut down.
They shut down the game......TO MAKE A HORROR GAME THAT ISNT EVEN AS FUN WHY?
This was the best game that i ever played this game was the best kind of gorilla tag fan game this was the reason why im playing so many fan games bring it back please😭
The game is a  fun game, but they have to restart the game for a  horror mode.   Like  bro  pls 😭 🙏  stick to the original game. Bro
I really wanted to play monkey but you restarted this game for a horror game and this is bendy
The game was fun until I got banned for something I didn’t do

Moke is actually one of the funnest things I have done in my life and the new car update makes it so much funner. With all the cosmetics and graphics the game is insane not to mention you can swing like Spider-Man in a jungle. I remember hanging out with all my friends in dungeon tag laughing so much and having such a fun time

Note for Developer: I get sad every time I see only 3 or so people online it’s such a good game and keep following what you are doing because it is impressive (also Mabye get YouTubers to play it to boost the game.)

I dont have time to type but I got reported by a guy named blue?
But he said I will get reported because of ￼Hate speech￼￼ if I DID NOTHING!
Really friendly community but the moderators are a**holes
This game is the definition of the best gorrila tag fan game it has good movement and the gameplay is very good and I can’t wait when horror comes out

- people get banned falsely 
- there’s racism and toxicity everywhere 
- always the kids that scream into ur ear

developer_response.body: Sorry but why is the game bad, if its the community causing issues?

reviews.review_description: this game isn’t actually lazy, They actually make pretty good updates, I really enjoyed the new gamemode. It has alot of minigames like tag, crown, slasher, etc. All of the hard coding for the minigames was definitely worth it! 11/10 rating

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for enjoying the game!!!
We really really really do appreciate it!

reviews.review_title: Pretty much don’t like this game  really
reviews.review_description: Some toxic people I swear if I install this game and it’s gonna be toxic, I’m gonna report there account so please add report and mute in the game. There’s some dicks in the game.

developer_response.body:
I am sorry you experienced a poor community,
Moke has a reporting system and Muting system in place, click your left controller pause button to open the menu.

Hey! We are very sorry your experience with Moke was poor, we would love to hear what you disliked so we can improve Moke to be the best experience for everyone, including you! Please let us know in our Discord or writing another review on what you'd like to see different and we'll do our best to make it happen!

reviews.review_title: Never recieved the in app purchase
reviews.review_description: Made an in-app purchase and never received the Mokash . Restarted and it still did not show up. When I asked for a refund meta says they cannot refund and must be done through app support. Not sure if that will get anywhere since their site doesn’t have many options. My son was really disappointed that he was charged and never received anything. Update: Contacted Moke customer service and they made it right within 24 hours.

developer_response.body: Thanks for reaching out to us to resolve your issue and for the 5 star review!

reviews.review_description: Come on moke at least show the map on lock down and it has been like a year since lock down and your not even doing anything 🙄 about the hackers because it's been sooooo long on lock down what is the creator crying because of hackers

developer_response.body: The game is back up and running, Is it possible you could remove this review?
